title: gastrolychnis involucrata subsp. elatior
intro: Gastrolychnis involucrata subsp. elatior, also known as the taller or taller leafed form of the Gastrolychnis involucrata, is a flowering plant species within the Gentianaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Gastrolychnis involucrata subsp. elatior include its potential to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to soothe digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Gastrolychnis involucrata subsp. elatior can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed for therapeutic use.
